div.head:
No. 354.
Mr. Frelinghuysen to Mr. Langston.
div.p: Sir: I have received and read with attention your dispatch No. 537, of the 31st ultimo, in which you report the insurrectionary movement undertaken by certain Haytian exiles at Miragoâne, and transmit the correspondence exchanged between yourself and Mr. Damier in relation thereto.

It is observed that Mr. Damier states that the vessel which carried the insurrectionary party to Hayti sailed under the flag of the United States. It is desirable that the name and home port of the vessel be ascertained, in order that it may be known whether she was in fact of American registry.
